And say something semi-embarrassing, but also something that's really grace giving for us. We at GymLaunch are made of a community of human beings, and every once in a while we make very human mistakes. And so it came to our attention that there was a gym lord who also hit seven figures who did not get a sword, who had already told us and it was simply a human error. And I think that it's always great to have the community that we have here, because you get to always see someone's true colors. And like even, I remember I started to talk to a COO the other day, and the way that he would interview his executives was he would take them out to a restaurant and mess up their order. And we'd go back to the kitchen, horribly destroy their order, or tell them to mess it up. They'd come out and just watch how the person reacted. And he had different buckets of what people would do. And so I just wanted to say thank you to the gym lords, plural, who received this mess up in the kitchen from us.
